channel.title: Microsoft Learn - in Intune
channel.description: The latest updates from Microsoft Learn in Intune

item.title: Encrypt Windows devices with BitLocker using Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Use Microsoft Intune policy to manage BitLocker encryption on Windows devices, including silent encryption and Personal Data Encryption.

item.title: In development - Microsoft Intune
item.description: This article describes Microsoft Intune features that are in development.

item.title: Deploy Remote Help with Microsoft Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Follow the steps to deploy Remote Help with Microsoft Intune on Windows, macOS, and Android Enterprise.

item.title: Migration guide to Microsoft Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Deployment guide to set up, onboard, or move to Intune. These steps include moving from partner MDM providers, using co-management, moving from on-premises group policy, and moving from Office 365 device management.

item.title: Deployment guide to manage macOS devices in Microsoft Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn the recommended processes to manage macOS devices in Microsoft Intune.

item.title: Deployment guide to manage iOS/iPadOS devices in Microsoft Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: A guide to managing iOS/iPadOS devices in Microsoft Intune.

item.title: Deployment guide to manage Android devices in Microsoft Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn the recommended processes to manage Android devices in Microsoft Intune.

item.title: Use Conditional Access with Microsoft Intune compliance policies - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Combine Conditional Access with Intune compliance policies to define the requirements that users and devices must meet before gaining access your organizations resources.

item.title: Protect data and devices with Microsoft Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn about the Intune capabilities that can help you protect your devices and data against unauthorized access and other threats.

item.title: Configure compliance policies - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Description for configuring compliance policies

item.title: Use app-based Conditional Access policies with Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn about using app-based Conditional Access policies with Microsoft Intune for both enrolled and unenrolled devices.

item.title: Get started with macOS endpoints - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Microsoft Intune guide to set up and configure macOS devices from setup to creating policies and enrolling devices. You secure your corporate and organization-owned endpoints that are enrolled in Intune, and then deploy at scale with Apple Business Manager or Apple School Manager.

item.title: Deployment guide for Linux device management - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Use our platform deployment guide to set up Linux device management in Microsoft Intune.

item.title: Remotely administer devices in Microsoft Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Install the previous TeamViewer connector to remotely administer devices using Microsoft Intune.

item.title: Deployment guide for Windows device management - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Use our platform deployment guide to set up Windows device management in Microsoft Intune.

item.title: Upgrade the Microsoft Tunnel Gateway server software - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Understand how Microsoft Tunnel Gateway upgrades to new versions of the tunnel software for Microsoft Intune.

item.title: Create Mobile Threat Defense compliance policies in Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Create an Intune device compliance policy that uses your MTD partner threat levels to determine if a mobile device can access company resources.

item.title: Get started with frontline worker (FLW) device management - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn how to manage frontline worker devices using Android, iOS/iPadOS, and Windows devices in Microsoft Intune. Get guidance on device use and Intune features built for FLW, like Remote Help. Also, learn about Microsoft Entra shared device mode (SDM) for FLW.

item.title: Update your workloads to support cloud-native endpoints - Microsoft Intune
item.description: To support hybrid and remote workers, convert or migrate your workloads to support cloud-native endpoints. This planning guide focuses on deploying apps and updates with Intune, moving from Group Policy Objects, and using Windows Autopilot.

item.title: Use Microsoft Tunnel VPN gateway with Conditional Access policies - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Configure your Azure tenant to support using Conditional Access policies to grant access to the Intune Microsoft Tunnel VPN gateway solution.

item.title: View ChromeOS device information - Microsoft Intune
item.description: View ChromeOS devices and details synced with the Chrome Enterprise connector in the Microsoft Intune admin center.

item.title: Device enrollment guide for Microsoft Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Enroll Android, Android Enterprise, iOS, iPadOS, Linux, macOS, and Windows devices in Intune. Decide which enrollment method to use, and get an overview of the administrator and end user tasks to enroll devices.

item.title: What's new in Microsoft Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Find out what's new in Microsoft Intune.

item.title: Set up automated device enrollment (ADE) for iOS/iPadOS - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn how to enroll corporate-owned iOS/iPadOS devices into Microsoft Intune with Apple Automated Device Enrollment (ADE).

item.title: Use the latest TeamViewer integration in Microsoft Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn how to use the latest TeamViewer integration in Microsoft Intune to initiate remote assistance sessions for managed devices.

item.title: Step 5 – Enroll devices in Microsoft Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Enroll Android, Android Enterprise, iOS, iPadOS, Linux, macOS, and Windows devices in Intune.

item.title: Configure Update Policies for Apple Devices - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn how to configure software update policies for Apple devices using Apple's Declarative Device Management (DDM) model. Improve security, reduce user disruption, and ensure compliance with reliable, automated updates across your organization.

item.title: Set up enrollment time grouping - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Overview and setup of the enrollment time grouping feature in Microsoft Intune.

item.title: Microsoft Intune Reports - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Intune provides specific report types with focused views that contain consistent and timely data.

item.title: Endpoint analytics overview - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Discover how Microsoft Intune endpoint analytics provides actionable insights to optimize device performance, improve user experience, and enable proactive IT troubleshooting.

item.title: Enable Windows diagnostic data and license verification - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn how to enable Intune tenant settings to use Windows diagnostic data and verify Windows licenses required for dependent features.

item.title: Deploy endpoint detection and response policy with Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Use Microsoft Intune endpoint security policies to configure and deploy Microsoft Defender for Endpoint EDR capabilities to Windows, macOS, and Linux devices.

item.title: Learn about the Microsoft Tunnel VPN solution for Microsoft Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn about the Microsoft Tunnel Gateway, a VPN server for Intune that runs on Linux. With Microsoft Tunnel, cloud-based devices you manage with Intune can reach your on-premises infrastructure.

item.title: Add groups to organize users and devices for Microsoft Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Create Microsoft Entra groups to organize users and devices for use with Microsoft Intune.

item.title: Device Query - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn how to use device query in Microsoft Intune to get on-demand device state, run Kusto Query Language (KQL) queries, and troubleshoot devices.

item.title: Manage attack surface reduction settings with Microsoft Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Configure and deploy policies for devices you manage with endpoint security attack surface reduction policy settings in Microsoft Intune.

item.title: High-Level Architecture for Microsoft Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: This reference architecture shows options for integrating Microsoft Intune in your Azure environment with Microsoft Entra ID.

item.title: Device Query for Multiple Devices - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Use device query for multiple devices in Microsoft Intune to run KQL queries, analyze inventory trends, and start querying your managed fleet now.

item.title: Configure Endpoint Analytics - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Step-by-step guide to configure endpoint analytics in Microsoft Intune, enroll devices, and manage data collection policies for device insights.

item.title: Use Intune to remediate vulnerabilities found by Microsoft Defender for Endpoint - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Integrate Microsoft Defender Vulnerability Management with Intune to create security tasks, track remediation, and reduce vulnerability exposure across managed devices.

item.title: Deploy Endpoint Privilege Management with Microsoft Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Understand the steps and phases for deploying Endpoint Privilege Management with Microsoft Intune.

item.title: Centrally manage Admin Tasks - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Centrally manage admin tasks in Microsoft Intune. Use the unified Admin tasks view to organize and act on administrative tasks from Device Offboarding, Endpoint Privilege Management, and more.

item.title: Automatically Hide Devices With Cleanup Rules - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Intune's device cleanup rules offer a simple, automated way to ensure that only actively managed devices remain visible in the admin center. Learn more about device cleanup rules and how to configure them.

item.title: Help Desk Troubleshooting Dashboard - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Help desk staff use the troubleshooting pane to solve users' technical problems.

item.title: Step 4. Create App Configuration Policies for Microsoft Edge for Business - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Step 4. Create app configuration policies for Microsoft Edge for Business across Windows, Android, and iOS platforms.

item.title: Reset and wipe Education devices - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn about the reset and wipe options for Windows devices using Intune for Education, including scenarios when to delete devices.

item.title: Device Scopes - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn how to use device scopes in Microsoft Intune with scope tags for custom device reporting and targeted insights.

item.title: Set up device management - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn how to configure the Intune service and set up the environment for education.

item.title: Common Education Windows Update configuration - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn about common Windows Update configuration used by Education organizations in Intune.

item.title: Plan Education device grouping and targeting - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Plan how you'll group devices and users and target policies and applications.

item.title: Get Started with the Device Offboarding Agent - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn about the Device Offboarding Agent in Microsoft Intune, its prerequisites, how it works, and how to configure it.

item.title: Troubleshoot Windows devices - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn how to troubleshoot Windows devices from Intune and contact Microsoft Support for issues related to Intune and other services.

item.title: Change Review Agent Overview - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn about the Change Review Agent in Microsoft Intune, its prerequisites, and how it works.

item.title: Remote Device Action: Reset Passcode - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn how to reset a passcode with Microsoft Intune.

item.title: Remote Device Action: Rename Device - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn how to use the Rename device remote action in Microsoft Intune to update the device name shown in the admin center. Useful for standardizing naming conventions, managing shared devices, and improving inventory clarity.

item.title: Remote Device Action: Send Custom Notification - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Use Intune to create and send custom notifications to users of iOS/iPadOS and Android devices.

item.title: Remote Device Action: Quick Scan - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn how to initiate on demand Microsoft Defender quick scan with Microsoft Intune.

item.title: Remote Device Action: Delete - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn how to delete devices with Microsoft Intune.

item.title: Remote Device Action: Update Cellular Data Plan - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn how to update the cellular data plan for iOS/iPadOS devices that support eSIM with Microsoft Intune.

item.title: Remote Device Action: Disable Activation Lock - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn how to use Microsoft Intune to disable Activation Lock on Apple devices.

item.title: Remote Device Action: Restart - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn how to restart managed devices with Microsoft Intune.

item.title: Remote Device Action: Autopilot Reset - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn how to use Autopilot reset with Microsoft Intune.

item.title: Remote Device Action: Full Scan - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn how to initiate on demand Microsoft Defender full scan with Microsoft Intune.

item.title: Remote Device Action: Rotate local admin password - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn how to rotate the local admin password on Windows and macOS devices with Microsoft Intune.

item.title: Remote Device Action: Wipe - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn how to wipe, or factory reset, devices with Microsoft Intune.

item.title: Remote Device Action: BitLocker Key Rotation - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn how to rotate the BitLocker recovery key with Microsoft Intune.

item.title: Remote Device Action: Logout current user - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn how to use the logout the current user from a Shared iPad with Microsoft Intune.

item.title: Remote Device Action: Remote Lock - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Use the remote lock action in Microsoft Intune to lock a managed device that has a passcode or PIN.

item.title: Remote Device Action: Sync - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn how to use the device sync remote action in Intune to apply policy, app, and configuration updates to managed devices.

item.title: Intune Remote Action: Rotate FileVault Recovery Key - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn how to rotate the FileVault recovery key with Microsoft Intune.

item.title: Remote Device Action: Find lost devices - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Locate lost or stolen devices by using the locate device feature in Microsoft Intune. Get details on security and privacy information when using the locate device action.

item.title: Remote Device Action: Fresh Start - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn how to use Fresh Start to remove or uninstall apps with Microsoft Intune.

item.title: Remote Device Action: Remove Apps and Configuration - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn how apps and configurations can be removed temporarily, then restored automatically or manually using the Remove apps and configuration device action with Intune.

item.title: Remote Device Action: Run Remediation - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn how to initiate on demand remediations with Microsoft Intune.

item.title: Remote Device Action: Pause Config Refresh - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn how to temporarily pause policy enforcement on Windows 11 devices using Intune's Pause Config Refresh remote action to support troubleshooting and manual changes.

item.title: Intune Remote Action: Deprovision - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn how to deprovision a chromeOS device with Microsoft Intune.

item.title: Remote Device Action: Rotate Recovery Lock Passcode - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn how to rotate the macOS Recovery Lock passcode with Microsoft Intune.

item.title: Remote Device Action: Lost Mode - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn how to enable Lost Mode in Microsoft Intune to remotely lock a lost or stolen iOS or iPadOS device and display a custom message and phone number on the lock screen.

item.title: Remote Device Action: Shutdown - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn how to shutdown Apple devices with Microsoft Intune.

item.title: Remote Device Action: Play Lost Mode Sound - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn how to use the Play lost device sound remote action in Microsoft Intune to trigger an audible alert on a lost, stolen, or misplaced device—helping users locate it quickly and securely.

item.title: Remote Device Action: Remove User - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn how to remove a user from a Shared iPad with Microsoft Intune.

item.title: Remote Device Action: Retire - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn how to retire device using Microsoft Intune.

item.title: Remote Device Action: Remove Passcode - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn how to remove a passcode with Microsoft Intune.

item.title: Remote Device Action: Collect Diagnostics - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn how to collect diagnostics with Microsoft Intune.

item.title: Add Win32 app supersedence - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn how to create supersedence relationships between Win32 apps in Microsoft Intune to update or replace existing apps with newer versions.

item.title: Microsoft Intune documentation - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Manage devices, apps, and security with Microsoft Intune.

item.title: App Protection Policies Overview - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn how Microsoft Intune app protection policies help protect your company data and prevent data loss.

item.title: Connect Intune account to managed Google Play account - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn how to connect your Intune account to your Managed Google Play account.

item.title: Set up automated device enrollment (ADE) for macOS - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn how to enroll corporate-owned Macs into Microsoft Intune with Apple Automated Device Enrollment (ADE).

item.title: Planning guide to move to Microsoft Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Plan, design, implement, adopt, and move to Microsoft Intune. Get guidance and advice to determine goals, use-case scenarios and requirements, and create rollout and communication plans, support, testing, and validation plans.

item.title: Collect device hardware info with the properties catalog - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Use the properties catalog in Microsoft Intune view and collect enhanced device hardware info on Windows devices you manage with Intune. You can collect info like BIOS version, TPM status, disk info, memory details, and network adapter configurations. Use this information to get deeper visibility into your device inventory and troubleshoot issues.

item.title: Enroll Android Enterprise dedicated, fully managed, or corporate-owned work profile devices in Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn how to enroll Android Enterprise dedicated, fully managed, or corporate-owned work profile devices in Intune.

item.title: How to Configure the Intune Company Portal Apps, Company Portal Website, and Intune App - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn how you can configure the Intune Company Portal apps, Company Portal website, and Intune app.

item.title: Set up local admin account creation and password management for macOS devices - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Set up macOS account configuration with LAPS through automatic device enrollment for macOS devices in Intune.

item.title: Deploy Intune policies to manage Windows LAPS - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Create policies to manage the Windows Local Administrator Policy Solution (LAPS) on Windows devices that enrolled with Microsoft Intune.

item.title: iOS/iPadOS direct enrollment - Apple Configurator-Setup Assistant - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Use Apple Configurator to enroll corporate-owned iOS/iPadOS devices with Setup Assistant.

item.title: Questions with policies and profiles in Microsoft Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Common questions, answers, and scenarios with device policies and profiles in Microsoft Intune. Learn more about profile changes not applying to users or devices, how long it takes for new policies to deploy, which settings apply when there are conflicts, what happens when you delete or remove a profile, and more.

item.title: Configure compliance policies with actions for noncompliance in Microsoft Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Configure your compliance policies with one or more actions for noncompliance to protect devices and your organization from unprotected devices. Actions can remotely lock devices, send email or notifications to device users, and more.

item.title: Manage and secure devices overview - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Get an overview of the concepts and features you should know when managing devices that access organization resources in Microsoft Intune. You can manage new and existing devices, including BYOD personal devices, check health compliance and view reports, configure device features, and secure devices using mobile threat solutions.

item.title: View device details with Microsoft Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: View your device details, including operating systems, storage space, manufacturer, and model. Get a list of installed apps, check compliance policies, and set up TeamViewer with Microsoft Intune in Azure. Similar to viewing inventory of the devices you manage.
